title: gaultheria × serrulata
intro: Gaultheria × serrulata, also known as the Gaultheria hybrid or Hybrid Gaultheria, is a man-made hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Gaultheria shallon and Gaultheria procumbens. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of gallic acid, which is responsible for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Gaultheria × serrulata include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Gaultheria × serrulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
